title: Stigmaphyllon palmatum
taxonomy: Stigmaphyllon palmatum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the genus Stigmaphyllon, which includes tropical plants native to Central and South America. The family Malpighiaceae comprises over 100 genera and 1,300 species of plants. These plants are primarily found in the Americas, with a few species found in Africa and Asia. Stigmaphyllon palmatum is a tropical plant with unique characteristics that have contributed to its classification within this family.

intro: Stigmaphyllon palmatum, also known as palm-leaf stigmaphyllon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic properties. The bioactive constituents of Stigmaphyllon palmatum include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
